# Lunal

> The AI confidential compute platform.

Lunal runs AI workloads (inference, training, agents) inside hardware-encrypted Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs). Data and code stay private during processing, can't be tampered with, and both claims are cryptographically verifiable without trusting Lunal.

Deploy code unchanged. Get end-to-end privacy, enhanced security, and full verifiability with negligible performance overhead.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://lunal.dev/): Overview, use cases, and how to use Lunal
- [Components](https://lunal.dev/components): Modular component catalogue (attestation service, KMS, build pipeline, networking, OHTTP gateway, control plane, hardened VM, SDKs)
- [Enterprise](https://lunal.dev/enterprise): How Lunal works with large organizations — discovery, pilot, production engagement model
- [Documentation](https://lunal.dev/docs): Technical documentation index

## Docs

- [Introduction to TEEs](https://lunal.dev/docs/intro-to-tees): High-level introduction to Trusted Execution Environments
- [Confidential Computing Primer](https://lunal.dev/docs/confidential-computing-primer): Six-part deep technical series on confidential computing using AMD SEV-SNP
  - [01. Threat Model & Security Boundaries](https://lunal.dev/docs/confidential-computing-primer/01-threat-model)
  - [02. Hardware Foundations](https://lunal.dev/docs/confidential-computing-primer/02-hardware-foundations)
  - [03. Memory Integrity](https://lunal.dev/docs/confidential-computing-primer/03-memory-integrity)
  - [04. Privilege & Communication](https://lunal.dev/docs/confidential-computing-primer/04-privilege-and-communication)
  - [05. Attestation & Verification](https://lunal.dev/docs/confidential-computing-primer/05-attestation)
  - [06. Measurement Strategies](https://lunal.dev/docs/confidential-computing-primer/06-measurement-strategies)
- [Attestable Builds](https://lunal.dev/docs/attestable-builds): What attestable builds are, why they matter, and how TEEs make software verification possible
  - [How It Works](https://lunal.dev/docs/attestable-builds/how-it-works): Architecture and mechanics of the attestable build pipeline
  - [Provenance & Standards](https://lunal.dev/docs/attestable-builds/provenance-standards): SLSA, in-toto, and how attestable build output fits the supply chain security ecosystem
  - [Threat Model](https://lunal.dev/docs/attestable-builds/threat-model): What attestable builds protect against and what they don't
- [Security Architecture](https://lunal.dev/docs/security): Lunal's security architecture, verification API, and CLI
- [Zero-Knowledge Proofs](https://lunal.dev/docs/zk): How Lunal uses ZK proofs to complement TEE attestations

## Blog

- [Secure AI Needs TEEs](https://lunal.dev/blog/secure-ai-needs-tees): Why TEEs are essential for AI security
- [TEE Performance on CPUs](https://lunal.dev/blog/tee-performance-cpus): Benchmarks showing ~1.5% overhead for TEE-protected workloads

- [Careers](https://lunal.dev/careers): Open positions at Lunal
